name: Green Bean and Fingerling Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds purple and/or white fingerling potatoes, scrubbed
1/4 cup chopped mixed fresh herbs (such as chives, garlic chives, thyme, parsley, mint, and summer savory leaves)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring salted water to a boil. Add fingerling potatoes and simmer until tender when pierced with a fork, about 10 minutes.
2. Drain the potatoes in a colander.
3. In a large saucepan, cook green beans in salted boiling water over high heat until crisp-tender, about 3 to 5 minutes.
4. Using tongs or a slotted spoon, transfer the beans to the colander with the potatoes and drain well.
5. In a large bowl, toss together warm potatoes, beans, herbs, oil, zest, and season with salt and pepper to taste. If preparing ahead, chill, covered, until ready to serve.
6. Serve salad warm or at room temperature. Salad may be made up to 1 day in advance.
